name: Portia the Dragonite
description:
Portia is the third child of a simple family of large, oversized Dragonites raised by a coach named Huggsy. Her father, Calamity, had three childs after being drunk more than once, involving a ditto. As such, Portia never had any mother figure to follow, only basing herself on her two older brothers and her scatterish yet loving and caring dad. While for most of her childhood she was the smallest of her family, she quickly became the biggest once she entered her late teens.

It is at that point that she was offered to join the barely starting Large Lady, back when it was a simple team, to act as the group's powerhouse. Probably the most known Large Lady also reputed to be that largest in the organization. Her status as the LL's powerhouse certainly helps on that.

For the record, this is the first time I've created a character here, so please be patient and I welcome feedback in case of errors.
creator: TrI
